creator: lumiwa@gmail.com
text:
Port www/node has
Build dependencies:

        c-ares>=1.15.0 : dns/c-ares
        libuv>=1.35.0 : devel/libuv
        libnghttp2>=1.40.0 : www/libnghttp2
        icu>=64.2 : devel/icu  
        gmake : devel/gmake
        python2.7 : lang/python27
        pkgconf>=1.3.0_1 : devel/pkgconf  

and Python 2/7 is deprecated.

Thank you.
